channel.title: summarizedStoriesPoliticsOffshootNL
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesPoliticsOffshootNL, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: ICE detention center expansion sparks national protest
item.description: The push to block ICE's plans to expand detention centers is fueling a coordinated national day of protests on Saturday. Why it matters: No Kings prot...

item.title: Trump's surge in oil exports during Iran war will hit a ceiling
item.description: The bottling up of Middle East oil is giving a lift to U.S. exports, but there are real limits on how much more they can grow. Why it matters: Preside...

item.title: DeSantis plots end run of Florida law to create more GOP House seats
item.description: Florida bans lawmakers from intentionally creating congressional seats to give their party an advantage. But Gov. Ron DeSantis quietly has launched a ...

item.title: Mike Johnson faces "hell week" as Republicans defy Trump
item.description: House Speaker Mike Johnson is staring down a brutal pre-recess session next week as he tries to cram three high-stakes votes through a fractured confe...

item.title: The pope moves to police AI
item.description: The Vatican is racing to build digital defenses for the artificial intelligence era — and quietly positioning itself as a global referee of what's rea...

item.title: White House loosens rules for preserving presidential records
item.description: After the Justice Department said a post-Watergate records law is unconstitutional, White House lawyers established a new policy that experts say weak...

item.title: U.S. soldier accused of pocketing $400,000 through bets on Maduro’s capture
item.description: The bet on the seizing of the Venezuelan leader has drawn scrutiny to insider trading within the growing prediction market industry.

item.title: DOJ watchdog launches review of agency’s compliance with Epstein files law
item.description: The audit by the department’s inspector general follows months of lawmaker complaints over the congressionally mandated release of investigative files...

item.title: Trump intends to invite Putin to G-20 summit in Miami, officials say
item.description: The Russian leader has not yet committed to attend the annual gathering of world leaders, which is scheduled for December at the president’s Doral gol...

item.title: Third U.S. aircraft carrier arrives in waters near Iran
item.description: The path of the USS George H.W. Bush to the Middle East has been closely watched as President Trump demands progress in peace negotiations with Tehran...

item.title: Canada’s prime minister says economic ties with US are a weakness that must be corrected
item.description: “We have to take care of ourselves because we can’t rely on one foreign partner,” Mark Carney said in a video address. “We can’t control the disruptio...

item.title: Trump Keeps Gambling With the Economy — And Getting Away With It
item.description: President Donald Trump has taken one risk after another that could have destabilized the American economy. Iran is the latest crisis to test U.S. econ...

item.title: Capitol agenda: GOP bets on immigration fight, not big bills
Reid Hoffman Raises $24.6 Million for AI Cancer-Research Startup
item.description: The LinkedIn co-founder is starting Manas AI with “The Emperor of All Maladies” author Siddhartha Mukherjee.

item.title: Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
item.description: DeepSeek, SoFi and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.

item.title: What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
item.description: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.

item.title: Silicon Valley Is Raving About a Made-in-China AI Model
item.description: DeepSeek is called “amazing and impressive” despite working with less-advanced chips.

item.title: Can an App Replace a Personal Trainer? I Tested Nearly a Dozen to Find Out
item.description: Apps can add flexibility and freshness to your routine. Just try not to get injured.
